required_skill_areas.data_engineering: 5+ years of experience as a data engineer, analytics engineer, or similar, with hands-on skills in SQL, Python, and cloud-native data tooling.
required_skill_areas.pre_sales: 2+ years in a pre-sales or solutions engineering role, ideally in the data or analytics space.
required_skill_areas.agent_development: You've built with or alongside AI systems in a real way… not just using AI tools to go a bit faster, but actually automating workflows, building agents, and multiplying your own output through smart systems.
required_skill_areas.databases: Deep familiarity with data warehouse architecture, performance optimization, and data modeling.
